name: SurveyMonkey
description: Drive SurveyMonkey from any AI agent: surveys, responses, collectors, contacts. 8 tools, OAuth2 Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the SurveyMonkey API v3 (api.surveymonkey.com/v3).

**Setup**:
1. Register at https://developer.surveymonkey.com → **Add new app** → Private app.
2. Pick scopes: Surveys (Read), Responses (Read), Collectors (Read+Write), Contacts (Read+Write), Webhooks (Read+Write).
3. Run the OAuth2 flow to obtain an access token. Set `SURVEYMONKEY_ACCESS_TOKEN`.
4. SurveyMonkey tokens are LONG-LIVED — but can be revoked by user via app dashboard.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${SURVEYMONKEY_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**Survey vs Collector vs Response**:
  - Survey: the question design.
  - Collector: a distribution channel (weblink/email/popup/embed) attached to a survey.
  - Response: a submission to a collector.

**Quirky response shape**: each response has `pages[]` → `questions[]` → `answers[]`. Answer shape varies by question type (single_choice, multiple_choice, text, etc.). Cross-reference with `surveymonkey_get_survey_details` to map answer choice IDs to display text.

**Pagination**: `?page=N&per_page=M` (max 1000 for some endpoints).

**Rate limits**: 500 req/day on Free tier, scales with paid plans. 60 req/min throttle. On 429 honor Retry-After.

**Out of scope here**: survey CRUD (use the SurveyMonkey designer), library themes, A/B testing, sentiment analysis built-ins.

tools.name: surveymonkey_get_user
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to.

tools.name: surveymonkey_list_surveys
tools.description: List surveys. Each returns id, title, nickname, href, question_count, response_count, date_created, date_modified.

tools.name: surveymonkey_get_survey_details
tools.description: Fetch a survey's full structure with pages[].questions[].answers (choice IDs → display text). Required to interpret responses.

tools.name: surveymonkey_list_survey_responses
tools.description: List responses to a survey (bulk endpoint includes full answer data). Filter by date range, collector, status.

tools.name: surveymonkey_get_response
tools.description: Fetch one response in full detail.

tools.name: surveymonkey_list_collectors
tools.description: List collectors (distribution channels) attached to a survey.

tools.name: surveymonkey_list_contact_lists
tools.description: List contact lists in the account (used for email distribution collectors).

tools.name: surveymonkey_add_contact_to_list
tools.description: Add a contact to a contact list. Required: email.
